title: Software Engineer Frontend - E5 (SDE4 Equivalent)
description:
**Who are we?** 




  





 Whatfix is an AI platform advancing the “userization” of enterprise applications, empowering companies to maximize the ROI of their digital investments. Technology needs adoption. It’s no different for AI. As AI reshapes roles, workflows, and human\\-machine interactions, it also introduces new layers of complexity and user friction. This is where Whatfix plays a pivotal role. A decade old DNA of empowering people to succeed with technology and not replacing them. We call this philosophy
 **Userization** 
 : the belief that technology must adapt to the user, not the other way around.
 



  





 At the heart of userization philosophy is
 **ScreenSense** 
 , our proprietary AI engine, which continuously interprets both the context of what users are doing in an application or an AI tool and the intent behind their actions. By combining these signals, Whatfix delivers real\\-time guidance, nudges, knowledge, and automation directly in the flow of work.
 



  





 This intelligence powers our entire product suite.
 



  




* **Digital Adoption** 
 helps users get productive faster.
* **Product Analytics** 
 uncovers friction and closes adoption gaps.
* **Mirror** 
 allows employees to train in safe, simulated environments.



  





 These are embedded with Whatfix
 **AI Agents** 
 which supercharge creation, insights, and user guidance.
 



  





 Our upcoming
 **AI\\-first products** 
 are already creating a buzz in the market.
 


* **Seek** 
 is an AI\\-native assistant that not only knows your business context but can also act across applications to get work done on your behalf.
* **Whatfix Mirror 2\\.0** 
 is the world’s only System plus Role simulation with a complete assessment to lead the Gen AI simulation category.



  





 Together, these products reflect Whatfix’s commitment to building enterprise\\-ready AI teammates that maximize productivity and ROI. It gives users a unified, intelligent way to find answers across systems, apps, and knowledge silos and helps anyone looking to deliver fast and contextual answers.
 



  





 Whatfix is bridging the gap between rapid technological change and human enablement—ensuring AI is not only embedded but also usable, trusted, and outcome\\-driven for every employee.
 



  





 At Whatfix, we’re not just making software easier—we’re making AI work for people.
 



 The company has seven offices across the US, India, UK, Germany, Singapore, and Australia and a presence across 40\\+ countries.
 



  





**Customers** 
 : 700\\+ enterprise customers, including 80\\+ Fortune 500 companies such as Shell, Schneider Electric, and UPS Supply Chain Solutions.
 



  





**Investors:** 
 A total of \\~$270 million USD has been raised as yet. Most recently Series E round of $125 Million USD led by Warburg Pincus, with participation from existing investor SoftBank Vision Fund 2\\. Other investors include Cisco Investments, Eight Roads Ventures (A division of Fidelity Investments), Dragoneer, Peak XV Partners, and Stellaris Venture Partners.
 



  





 Whatfix’s leadership is consistently recognized across top industry analysts and business rankings:
 


* Won the 2025
 
 AI Breakthrough Award
 
 for the Overall AI\\-based Analytics Solution of the Year
* Only DAP to be recognized as a “Leader” across various DAP reports for the past 5\\+ years by leading analyst firms like Gartner, Forrester, IDC, and Everest Group.
* With over 45% YoY sustainable annual recurring revenue (ARR) growth, Whatfix is among the “Top 50 Indian Software Companies” as per G2 Best Software Awards.
* Named a Gartner Customers’ Choice for DAP for the second year in a row (2024 and 2025\\)—the only vendor in the market to earn this distinction consecutively.
* We also boast a star rating of 4\\.6 on G2 Crowd, 4\\.5 on Gartner Peer Insights, and a super\\-high CSAT of 99\\.8%
* Stevie
 
 Award winner in the category (Bronze): Customer Service Department of the Year – Computer Software \\- 100 or More Employees.
* Winner of the ISG Paragon
 
 Innovation Award in partnership with Sophos (customer) for the EMEA region and finalist in the Transformation Award category.
* RemoteTech Breakthrough Awards
 
 winner for “Software Asset Management Solution of the Year”



 These recognitions are matched by business performance:
 


* Highest\\-Ranking DAP on 2023 Deloitte Technology Fast 500™ North America for Fifth Consecutive Year
* Listed on the
 **Financial Times \\& Statista's High\\-Growth Companies Asia\\-Pacific 2025** 
 list.
* Won the Silver for Stevie's Employer of the Year 2023 – Computer Software category and also recognized as Great Place to Work 2022\\-2023
* Only DAP to be among the top 35% companies worldwide in sustainability excellence with EcoVadis Bronze Medal



  





**Roles and Responsibilities** 



* Independently design, develop, test, and ship frontend features using React and modern web technologies.
* Own task breakdown from product stories, ensuring that each task is well\\-scoped and deliverable within 5 days.
* Write clean, maintainable, and well\\-documented code that meets internal quality standards and is easy for others to understand.
* Build highly performant, scalable, and responsive user interfaces with a strong focus on usability and accessibility.
* Implement and maintain effective monitoring and alerting for frontend components in production.
* Actively contribute to sprint demos, design discussions, and retrospectives.
* Participate in code reviews to ensure high quality and consistency in the codebase.
* Align with other teams when working on shared code or integrating cross\\-functional features.
* Collaborate with backend engineers to ensure seamless integration between frontend and backend systems.
* Leverage generative AI to increase development efficiency and maintain high velocity in deliverables.



  





**Requirements** 



* 5–10 years of professional experience in frontend development, preferably in product\\-led internet companies or startups.
* Experience writing clean JavaScript including experience with modern frameworks (Javascript/React) and debugging tools (Chrome Dev Tools, etc).
* In\\-depth understanding of cross\\-browser compatibility and solutions
* Strong debugging and troubleshooting skills.
* Hands\\-on experience with the React ecosystem including React Router, Styled Components, SSR, Context API, and Hooks.
* Proficiency with state management tools like Redux or MobX.
* Ability to independently own and deliver frontend features end to end — from design to monitoring in production.
* Exposure to or active use of generative AI tools for code generation or optimization is preferred.
* Strong understanding of design principles, system performance, and frontend architecture
* Excellent communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively across teams.
* Fast learner, proactive problem solver, and a team player with a strong focus on quality and user experience.



  





**Good to Have** 



* Webpack build tool with module federation \\& Micro front\\-end architecture experience
* Proven experience working in a fast\\-paced environment, preferably for internet companies, products, or startups
* Strong grasp of design principles and their practical application
* Eager to learn and thrive in a collaborative team environment
* Experience building scalable web applications using Java and Spring, or familiarity with microservices architecture is a strong plus



  





**Why Join Us?** 



* Be part of a fast\\-growing team driving critical backend infrastructure for Whatfix products.
* Opportunity to work on modern technology stacks and contribute to systems at scale.
* Transparent growth path with clear expectations and regular reviews.
* Flexible work environment with high ownership and impactful challenges.



  





**Perks \\& Benefits (India)** 



* Best\\-in\\-class medical insurance coverage
* Free lunch \\& dinner buffet
* Doorstep cab drop facility
* Education sponsorship
* Internal job transfer \\& global mobility programs
* Scope to represent Whatfix at global events
* We also provide uncapped incentives, bonus plans and opportunities to employees (especially those in GTM teams) to travel to meet our global customers.



  





**Note:** 



* We strive to live and breathe our Cultural Principles and encourage employees to demonstrate some of these core values \\- Customer First; Empathy; Transparency; Fail Fast and scale Fast; No Hierarchies for Communication; Deep Dive and innovate; Trust, Do it as you own it;
* We are an
 **equal opportunity employer** 
 and value diverse people
 **because of** 
 and not in spite of the differences. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status
* At Whatfix, we deeply value
 **collaboration, innovation, and human connection** 
 . We believe that being together in the office five days a week fosters
 **open communication** 
 , strengthens our sense of community, and accelerates innovation—ultimately helping us achieve our goals more effectively. At the same time, we recognize the importance of
 **flexibility** 
 in balancing personal and professional priorities. To support this, we offer the option to
 **work from home up to two days per month** 
 .
* In any situation that requires additional flexibility, we’re open to
 **considering exceptions on a case\\-by\\-case basis** 
 to ensure you’re supported in managing both work and life seamlessly.

title: Software Engineer - AI/ML
description:
**About ValGenesis**
 ValGenesis is a leading digital validation platform provider for life sciences companies. ValGenesis suite of products are used by 30 of the top 50 global pharmaceutical and biotech companies to achieve digital transformation, total compliance and manufacturing excellence/intelligence across their product lifecycle.
   

  

 Learn more about working for ValGenesis, the de facto standard for paperless validation in Life Sciences: https://www.valgenesis.com/about
   

  

 About the Role:
   

  

 We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to join our dynamic team to build the next gen applications for our global customers. If you are a technology enthusiast and highly passionate, we are eager to discuss with you about the potential role.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Implement, and deploy Machine Learning solutions to solve complex problems and deliver real business value, ie. revenue, engagement, and customer satisfaction.
* Collaborate with data product managers, software engineers and SMEs to identify AI/ML opportunities for improving process efficiency.
* Develop production\\-grade ML models to enhance customer experience, content recommendation, content generation, and predictive analysis.
* Monitor and improve model performance via data enhancement, feature engineering, experimentation and online/offline evaluation. Stay up\\-to\\-date with the latest in machine learning and artificial intelligence, and influence AI/ML for the Life science industry
* Stay up\\-to\\-date with the latest in machine learning and artificial intelligence, and influence AI/ML for the Life science industry.


**Requirements**
* 2 \\- 4 years of experience in AI/ML engineering, with a track record of handling increasingly complex projects.
* Strong programming skills in Python, Rust.
* Experience with Pandas, NumPy, SciPy, OpenCV (for image processing)
* Experience with ML frameworks, such as scikit\\-learn, Tensorflow, PyTorch.
* Experience with GenAI tools, such as Langchain, LlamaIndex, and open source Vector DBs.
* Experience with one or more Graph DBs \\- Neo4J, ArangoDB
* Experience with MLOps platforms, such as Kubeflow or MLFlow.
* Expertise in one or more of the following AI/ML domains: Causal AI, Reinforcement Learning, Generative AI, NLP, Dimension Reduction, Computer Vision, Sequential Models.
* Expertise in building, deploying, measuring, and maintaining machine learning models to address real\\-world problems.
* Thorough understanding of software product development lifecycle, DevOps (build, continuous integration, deployment tools) and best practices.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills and interpersonal skills.
* Advanced degree in Computer Science, Machine Learning or related field.


**We’re on a Mission**
 In 2005, we disrupted the life sciences industry by introducing the world’s first digital validation lifecycle management system. ValGenesis VLMS® revolutionized compliance\\-based corporate validation activities and has remained the industry standard.
   

  

 Today, we continue to push the boundaries of innovation ― enhancing and expanding our portfolio beyond validation with an end\\-to\\-end digital transformation platform. We combine our purpose\\-built systems with world\\-class consulting services to help every facet of GxP meet evolving regulations and quality expectations.
   

  

**The Team You’ll Join**
 Our customers’ success is our success. We keep the customer experience centered in our decisions, from product to marketing to sales to services to support. Life sciences companies exist to improve humanity’s quality of life, and we honor that mission.
   

  

 We work together. We communicate openly, support each other without reservation, and never hesitate to wear multiple hats to get the job done.
   

  

 We think big. Innovation is the heart of ValGenesis. That spirit drives product development as well as personal growth. We never stop aiming upward.
   

  

 We’re in it to win it. We’re on a path to becoming the number one intelligent validation platform in the market, and we won’t settle for anything less than being a market leader.
   

  

**How We Work**
 Our Chennai, Hyderabad and Bangalore offices are onsite, 5 days per week. We believe that in\\-person interaction and collaboration fosters creativity, and a sense of community, and is critical to our future success as a company.
   

  

 ValGenesis is an equal\\-opportunity employer that makes employment decisions on the basis of merit. Our goal is to have the best\\-qualified people in every job. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or any other characteristics protected by local law.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Java Software Engineer
description:
**Job Description: Java Software Engineer (Contracts)** 




**Company: Netra Labs** 




**Location: Work From Office – Pune (Baner)** 




**Employment Type: Contractual (12 months, extendable)** 




**Experience: 3\\+ years** 




**Preference: Maharashtra resident candidates**




  





**About Netra Labs** 
 \\-
 



 We're building the future of enterprise AI at Netra Labs—crafting intelligent, scalable solutions that transform how businesses operate. Our proprietary Ground Truth® framework powers expert AI agents that deliver real ROI for clients across industries. As we scale our platform capabilities, we need sharp Java engineers who can build rock\\-solid back\\-end services that power our AI infrastructure.
 



**The Role** 
 \\-
 



 You'll be a hands\\-on Core Java Developer owning critical back\\-end modules of our AI platform—from document processing pipelines (powered by AWS Textract) to real\\-time agent orchestration services. While you'll operate as an individual contributor, you'll also step up to guide junior engineers and coordinate technical execution when needed. This is a
 *work\\-from\\-office* 
 role because we believe some of the best ideas happen when smart people share a whiteboard.
 



**What You'll Own** 
 \\-
 


* Design, build, and optimize high\\-performance Java services using Java 17/21 and Spring Boot
* Architect and maintain data layers with MongoDB, ensuring scalability for AI workloads
* Build and manage CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions for seamless deployments
* Deploy and manage services on AWS EC2, with hands\\-on experience integrating AWS Textract for document intelligence workflows
* Write clean, testable code with strong emphasis on maintainability (we're serious about reducing technical debt)
* Troubleshoot production issues and own service reliability
* Occasionally lead sprint planning or mentor junior engineers on best practices



**Who You Are** 
 \\-
 



 ✅ 4\\+ years of hands\\-on experience in Core Java development with deep understanding of concurrency, JVM internals, and performance tuning
 



 ✅ Production experience with Spring Boot (not just tutorials—we want to see how you've used it to solve real problems)
 



 ✅ Built and maintained applications using MongoDB (schema design, indexing, aggregation pipelines)
 



 ✅ Automated deployments via GitHub Actions or similar CI/CD tools
 



 ✅ Comfortable on AWS—specifically EC2 deployments and Textract integration for extracting text/data from documents
 



 ✅ Strong grasp of REST APIs, micro services architecture, and debugging distributed systems
 



 ✅ Bonus if you've worked with AI/ML pipelines or document processing systems before
 



  





**Industry** 



* Software Development



  





**Employment Type** 



* Full Time \\- Contract

title: Web Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 At Ankashram, we are committed to delivering innovative digital solutions that empower businesses to establish a strong online presence. Our team specializes in creating high\\-performance websites and seamless e\\-commerce platforms tailored to meet the unique needs of our clients. With a focus on quality, efficiency, and cutting\\-edge technology, Ankashram has built a reputation for excellence in web development and digital transformation services. We foster a collaborative and dynamic work environment that encourages creativity, continuous learning, and professional growth. Our mission is to help businesses thrive in the digital age by providing customized, scalable, and user\\-centric web solutions that drive engagement and conversions.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled and proactive Web Developer with expertise in Shopify and WordPress to join our team immediately. The ideal candidate will be responsible for developing, customizing, and maintaining high\\-quality websites that align with client requirements and industry standards. You will work closely with designers, project managers, and stakeholders to deliver visually appealing, responsive, and secure websites that enhance user experience. This role requires a hands\\-on approach to coding, troubleshooting, and optimizing websites for performance, SEO, and responsiveness across various devices. The successful candidate will demonstrate a strong understanding of modern web technologies, payment integrations, and best practices in web development, ensuring the delivery of scalable and maintainable solutions.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should possess a minimum of one year of relevant experience in web development, with a strong portfolio demonstrating expertise in Shopify and WordPress. Proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and jQuery is essential, along with solid knowledge of PHP and MySQL. Hands\\-on experience with Shopify Liquid, APIs, and app integrations is required, as is familiarity with custom theme and plugin development in WordPress. Knowledge of payment gateway integrations such as Razorpay, Stripe, and PayPal is crucial. Familiarity with performance optimization tools like PageSpeed Insights and GTmetrix, along with a good understanding of SEO best practices, is highly desirable. Candidates should also be experienced with version control systems like Git and capable of writing clean, reusable, and scalable code. Strong problem\\-solving skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work under tight deadlines are essential qualities for this role.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Develop, customize, and maintain Shopify and WordPress websites to meet client specifications and industry standards.
* Create websites beyond standard templates by designing custom themes and functionalities tailored to client needs.
* Integrate various payment gateways such as Razorpay, Stripe, and PayPal to facilitate secure and seamless transactions.
* Implement and manage plugins and apps to enhance website performance, speed, security, and user experience.
* Optimize websites for performance, SEO, and responsiveness across different devices and browsers.
* Troubleshoot bugs, resolve issues, and ensure smooth website functionality through timely interventions.
* Collaborate with designers, content creators, and stakeholders to deliver high\\-quality, user\\-centric websites.
* Maintain clean, well\\-documented, and scalable code for future updates and maintenance.
* Handle website migrations, backups, deployments, and version control management effectively.


**Benefits**
 Joining Ankashram offers an opportunity to work in a dynamic and growth\\-oriented environment. We provide competitive compensation packages aligned with industry standards, along with opportunities for professional development and skill enhancement. Our team benefits from flexible work arrangements, a collaborative work culture, and exposure to the latest web development technologies. We also promote a healthy work\\-life balance and recognize individual contributions. As part of our commitment to employee growth, we offer ongoing training and certification opportunities to help you stay ahead in the rapidly evolving digital landscape.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 At Ankashram, we are an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, gender, age, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe in fostering a workplace where everyone has the opportunity to thrive, grow, and contribute to our collective success.

description:

The company is best known for its FICO Score, a trusted metric used globally in credit risk assessment. Our commitment to innovation, integrity, and customer success positions us as a trusted partner for organizations seeking to leverage data for competitive advantage. Joining FICO means being part of a forward\\-thinking team that values expertise, collaboration, and continuous growth, offering an environment where your contributions can truly make an impact.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled Front\\-End Developer to join our dynamic team in Bangalore or Hyderabad on a hybrid work basis. Your expertise will be crucial in translating design mock\\-ups into functional prototypes and production\\-ready applications that deliver exceptional user experiences. You will collaborate closely with cross\\-functional teams, including Product Management, UX, Backend, QA, and DevOps, to build scalable, reusable, and high\\-performance micro\\-frontends and UI components. Your focus will be on optimizing web applications for speed and performance, ensuring cross\\-browser compatibility, and maintaining a clean, well\\-documented codebase. This position offers an exciting opportunity to work on innovative projects at the forefront of AI technology, contributing to the development of next\\-generation solutions that impact global markets.
   

  

**Qualifications**

* Solid understanding of web architecture, UI principles, and front\\-end best practices.

* Proficiency with version control systems like GitHub and automation tools such as GitHub Actions or similar.

* Experience working across the full stack to deliver seamless and engaging user interfaces.

* Excellent collaboration and communication skills, with experience working in globally distributed teams.

**Responsibilities**

* Conduct thorough testing of web applications to identify and resolve bugs, ensuring a seamless and engaging user experience.
* Iterate on designs and features based on user feedback and analytics to continuously improve usability and performance.
* Contribute to the architectural design and development of innovative solutions aligned with business goals.
* Create and maintain modular, reusable code components to streamline development and facilitate future enhancements.
* Participate in peer code reviews and solution design discussions to uphold quality standards.
* Adhere to internal coding standards, best practices, and contribute to the refinement of development processes.


**Benefits**
 FICO offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to support our employees’ well\\-being and professional growth. This includes competitive salary packages, health insurance coverage, and wellness programs. Employees have access to flexible work arrangements, including a hybrid work model, to promote work\\-life balance. We also provide opportunities for continuous learning through training programs, workshops, and industry certifications. Our inclusive culture encourages innovation, collaboration, and recognition, fostering an environment where your ideas and contributions are valued. Additionally, FICO supports employee development through mentorship programs and career advancement pathways. Join us to be part of a forward\\-thinking organization that invests in its people and drives technological excellence.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 FICO is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse workplace. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, national origin, disability, or any other protected characteristic. We believe that a diverse workforce enhances our innovation and success, and we are dedicated to providing an environment where all employees can thrive and contribute their best. We welcome applications from candidates of all backgrounds and experiences who are passionate about making a difference through technology and analytics.

title: R&D Senior Engineer
description:
At ABB, we help industries run leaner and cleaner—and every person here makes that happen. You’ll be empowered to lead, supported to grow, and proud of the impact we create together. Join us and help run what runs the world.
   

  

 This Position reports to:
   

  

 R\\&D Department Lead
   

  

  

  

  

**Your role and responsibilities :**
 In this role, you will have the opportunity to contribute to ABB’s success with technology, software, product, and system development. Each day, you will identify and implement innovative solutions to relevant problems. You will also showcase your expertise by providing ideas and by being able to work both independently and as a part of a Research \\& Development (R\\&D) team.
   

  

 The work model for the role is: Hybrid
   

  

 This role is contributing to the Process Automation Business of Measurement and Analytics Division in Bangalore.
   

  

 You will be mainly accountable for:
   

  

* You will be an active contributor to product development in Business Line Instrumentation from early concept phase to design, validation and release to the manufacturing units.
* You will work in R\\&D multidisciplinary project teams for design and development of embedded software for Instrumentation devices, and you will be responsible for functionality, performance, cost and quality of the deliveries.
* You will be coordinating with hardware engineer and PC software \\& certification engineers for system debugging, designing and testing \\& documentation.
* You will be working with technical experts and product managers in analyzing and implementing functional requirements considering scalability, extensibility, complexity of the software to solve complex problems.
* You will collaborate actively with technical experts from other areas across functions and contribute to relevant forums both internal and external.


**Qualifications for the role :**
* Bachelor’s degree or above Computer Engineering, Electrical /Electronic Engineering from a reputed University.
* 8 to 15 years of relevant work experience in embedded device software development preferably in electronic measurement instruments.
* Good knowledge and hands\\-on experience in C/C\\+\\+ language, familiar with DSP or ARM platforms and familiar with hardware driver development skills.
* Proficient in embedded OS (ucOS/RTOS/FreeRTOS/eCos/VxWorks/Linux) development and solid knowledge in IDE, IAR/CCS/Keil
* Strong interest in physics and sensing technologies. Domain knowledge in one of the following areas: process automation (preferred), industrial applications, automotive, medical.
* Hands\\-on experience in with development tools like GIT, Azure DevOps, IDE, JIRA is a plus.
* Relevant experience in industrial product development processes and knowledge in safety critical industrial applications


**More about us :**
 The Measurement \\& Analytics Division is among the world’s leading manufacturers and suppliers of smart instrumentation and analyzers, working at the heart of industrial digital transformation. The Measurement \\& Analytics Division’s portfolio consists of analyzers measuring compositions of gases and liquids; instrumentation measuring process variables such as temperature, pressure, flow, and level; force measurement solutions measuring parameters such as flatness, thickness, and tension; and advanced digital solutions for device management, device health check and predictive maintenance. The Measurement \\& Analytics Division serves key industries such as oil and gas, chemical, water and wastewater, power, hydrogen, batteries, as well as the marine industry. The Division enables the optimization of industrial processes by providing and analyzing data collected from sensing and smart measurement devices. Parameters such as emission levels and production inputs are measured by providing ‘before’ and ‘after’ values, enabling efficient operations and environmental sustainability through measurement.
   

  

 Building a cleaner, smarter future takes all kinds of minds: the curious, the courageous, and the creative. We welcome people from all backgrounds and experiences.
   

  

 Ready to make an impact? Apply today or visit www.abb.com to learn more about the impact of our solutions across the globe.

title: Senior Adobe Target Developer
description:
NO FRESHER WILL BE PREFERRED
   

  

 HIRING
   

  

 We are hiring for Senior Adobe Target Developer as a Full Time for IT Company
   

  

 Location\\- Pune
   

 Experience \\- 7\\+ years
   

 Budget \\- As per market standards
   

 Notice Period \\- Immediate Joiner
   

  

 We are seeking a high\\-caliber Adobe Experience Cloud Specialist to join our IT Digital Team, specifically supporting our Marketing, Data Security, and Cybersecurity business units. This is a critical role for a seasoned expert who can navigate the complexities of a security\\-conscious environment while maximizing the power of the Adobe suite.
   

 You will act as the technical architect and "boots\\-on\\-the\\-ground" developer, responsible for auditing our current implementation, identifying data leakage or compliance risks, and executing a roadmap for optimization. You must be comfortable working independently and making high\\-stakes technical recommendations.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

 1\\. Strategic Audit \\& Optimization
   

 Current State Review: Perform a comprehensive audit of existing Adobe Analytics (SDR, variables, processing rules) and Adobe Target activities.
   

 Optimization Roadmap: Identify "technical debt" in the current tagging structure and provide a prioritized plan to improve data fidelity and site performance.
   

 Security \\& Compliance: Configure and maintain cookie consent workflows, tag firing rules, and opt\\-in/opt\\-out logic within Adobe Analytics and Adobe Target to align with GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, and ePrivacy requirements, including integration with the company's CMP
   

 Conduct periodic privacy audits of Adobe implementations to identify consent drift, unauthorized data collection, or misfiring tags, and collaborate with legal/privacy teams on compliant approaches to analytics tracking and personalization
   

 2\\. Technical Implementation \\& Development
   

 Adobe Target Dev: Act as the primary developer for Target. This includes writing custom JavaScript, CSS, and HTML to execute complex A/B tests and personalization experiences that the Visual Experience Composer (VEC) cannot handle.
   

 Tag Management: Manage the end\\-to\\-end deployment of tags via Adobe Launch (AEP Data Collection), ensuring minimal impact on page load speeds.
   

 Server\\-Side Tracking: Explore and implement server\\-side tracking (AEP Web SDK) to bypass browser restrictions and enhance security.
   

 3\\. Data Governance \\& Security
   

 Documentation: Maintain the Solution Design Reference (SDR) and technical playbooks to ensure "Zero Trust" principles are applied to marketing data.
   

 Implement and manage Adobe Analytics Data Governance labels (DULE), IP obfuscation, data retention settings, and cookie/tracking technology inventories to support data minimization and privacy compliance obligations
   

  

 Required Technical Skills \\& Qualifications
   

 7\\+ Years of Experience: Proven track record in digital analytics and optimization, specifically within large\\-scale IT or Security\\-focused organizations.
   

 Adobe Expert: Mastery of Adobe Analytics (Analysis Workspace, Report Builder) and Adobe Target (Premium features, Recommendations, Automated Personalization).
   

 Frontend Development: Expert\\-level JavaScript (ES6\\+) is non\\-negotiable. You must be able to code your own solutions within the Adobe stack.
   

 Independence: Ability to take a business problem and turn it into a technical solution with minimal supervision.
   

 Communication: Ability to explain complex data privacy risks (like "data selling" or "pixel scraping") to non\\-technical marketing stakeholders.
   

 Experience with Security Standards Given our domain in Security, the ideal candidate will have experience with:
   

 Content Security Policy (CSP) management.
   

 Privacy\\-first tracking (Cookieless environments).
   

 Working within IT Change Management (Jira/ServiceNow) to ensure all pixel changes are vetted by InfoSec.
   

  

 Preferred Qualifications
   

 Must Have Adobe Certified Expert (ACE) \\- Analytics Architect or Target Developer.
   

 Nice to Have Experience in the Cybersecurity or Fintech industry.
   

 Familiarity with the Adobe Experience Platform (AEP) and Web SDK.
